title: fridericia nicotianiflora
intro: Fridericia nicotianiflora, also known as Nicotiana, is a plant species belonging to the nightshade family and is native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Fridericia nicotianiflora include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as pain relief and improved digestion. Fridericia nicotianiflora can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used to make tinctures or other herbal preparations.
